user_question: gia đình ông/bà PHẠM VĂN LONG có bao nhiêu điểm b1 năm 2024

query_plan.original_question: Gia đình ông/bà PHẠM VĂN LONG có bao nhiêu điểm b1 năm 2024

sql: SELECT "family.hostName" AS host_name, "family.code" AS household_id, "administrative.district" AS district, "administrative.commune" AS commune, ROUND(AVG(b1Point), 2) AS avg_b1 FROM households WHERE LOWER("family.hostName") = 'phạm văn long' AND "administrative.year" = 2024 GROUP BY host_name, household_id, district, commune
